message: Using mutable data structures for teaching purposes is usually discouraged. Replace Hashtables by standard tree-like maps or consider Hash-Array Mapped Tries (HAMT). Use mutable `ref`erences and mutable structure fields only if it is really required. In all places where it is needed indeed, describe in a comment why it is needed there.

Using mutable data structures for teaching purposes is usually discouraged. Replace Hashtables by standard tree-like maps or consider Hash-Array Mapped Tries (HAMT). Use mutable `ref`erences and mutable structure fields only if it is really required. In all places where it is needed indeed, describe in a comment why it is needed there.

Match is redundant. It's recommended to rewrite it as 'if options.multiline
                                                       then
                                                         run_many options.env
                                                       else
                                                         run_one options.env'

Eta reduction proposed. It's recommended to rewrite 'fun state -> func state' as 
'func'
